The '''Txs-431 flight control console''' was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. Used throughout the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] onboard [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and both [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]], it assisted hangar bay personnel in launching and recovering [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="EGWT" />

The console had several specialized [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] feeding information into it, including [[electro photo receptor]]s, [[Dedicated energy receptor/Legends|dedicated energy receptors]], and [[Full-spectrum transceiver/Legends|full-spectrum transceivers]]. The sensor data allowed the Txs-431 to identify incoming fighters and scan for supplemental information about the vessel such as any damage sustained, whether or not the shields or weapons were charged, and the number of lifeforms on board.<ref name="EGWT" />
